ai_role: generate candidate examples, conjectures, code, proof sketches, or formal statements
human_role: frame search space and define what counts as relevant
risk: irrelevant or fluent but false output
mitigation: classify output type and do not treat it as proof
audit_note: generation, testing, proof, and interpretation should remain distinct stages

ai_role: suggest tests or write test code
evaluator_role: run finite checks, objective scoring, symbolic checks, or counterexample search
human_role: design meaningful edge cases and interpret results
mitigation: use multiple evaluators and held-out cases
audit_note: generation, testing, proof, and interpretation should remain distinct stages

ai_role: suggest lemmas, proof strategies, or formal proof scripts
evaluator_role: proof assistant, theorem prover, or expert proof review
human_role: verify each inference and review formal statement
mitigation: formalize or independently prove each step
audit_note: generation, testing, proof, and interpretation should remain distinct stages

ai_role: summarize, compare, or explain candidate results
evaluator_role: literature review, expert review, and reproducibility review
human_role: judge significance, novelty, credit, and scope
mitigation: document workflow and place result within existing mathematics
audit_note: generation, testing, proof, and interpretation should remain distinct stages
